groupings.title: Listing
groupings.description: Owner-facing skills for declaring products and release-note locations on releases.sh.

groupings.title: Onboarding & parsing (managed agents)
groupings.description: Deployed to the production discovery/worker managed agents; also used by local operators when onboarding sources.

groupings.title: Registry maintenance (operator)
groupings.description: Local Claude Code operator skills for maintaining the registry — ingest, backfills, overviews, content generation, playbooks, coverage curation. Most need an admin API key.
